chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD. C. P. No. D — 2359 of 2018. DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE[S] 11.05.2022. FOR HEARING OF MAIN CASE. Mr. Muhammad Saleem Ansari Advocate for petitioner. Mr. Osama Yousuf advocate for respondent No.10. Mr. Allah Bachayo Soomro Addl. A.G. Sindh. ------- This petition apparently has served its purpose as the alleged barriers have been removed by the officials of Sindh Government which is confirmed by respondents No.10 & 11 the private respondents. None of the respondents have any intention to re-erect such barriers which may curtail the rights of ingress and egress of the petitioners towards their houses. This being a situation and understanding the petition is disposed of accordingly. JUDGE JUDGE A
